zh.Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England: 英國爾波特 史利格利
zh.of Shrigley, Chester, Eng: 英國英格蘭爾史利格利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Downes於1238年出生在英國爾霍利時，他的父親Lord Robert Downes II30歲，母親Agnes Tabley23歲。他於大約1280年與Margaret Fitton在英國爾波特 史利格利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1306年在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England: 英国爾波特 史利格利
zh-hans.of Shrigley, Chester, Eng: 英国英格兰爾史利格利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Downes于1238年出生在英国爾霍利时，他的父亲Lord Robert Downes II30岁，母亲Agnes Tabley23岁。他于大约1280年与Margaret Fitton在英国爾波特 史利格利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1306年在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Downes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Down with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (counties Clare and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Irish Gaelic Ó Dubháin (see Doane ).

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

variants.name: Downs
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Downes  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Downes was born in 1238, in Chorley, Cheshire, England, his father, Lord Robert Downes II, was 30 and his mother, Agnes Tabley, was 23. He married Margaret Fitton about 1280, in Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1306, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Downes est né en 1238, à Chorley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Robert Downes II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Tabley, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fitton environ 1280, à Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1306, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Downes 1238 in Chorley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Robert Downes II 30 und seine Mutter Agnes Tabley 23. Er hat um 1280 in Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England Margaret Fitton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1306 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Downes è nato il nel 1238 nel Chorley, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Robert Downes II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Tabley, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Fitton circa 1280, nel Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1306, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Downesが1238年にイギリスチェシュアイアチオルリーで生まれた時，父Lord Robert Downes IIは30歳，母Agnes Tableyは23歳であった。約1280年にイギリスチェシュアイアポット シュリグリーでMargaret Fittonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1306年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Downes(이)가 1238년 영국 체실르 초를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Robert Downes II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Tabley(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1280년 영국 체실르 포트 슈리글리에서 Margaret Fitton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1306년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.of Shrigley, Chester, Eng: Shrigley, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Downes nasceu em 1238, em Chorley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Robert Downes II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Tabley, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Fitton aproximadamente 1280, em Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1306, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Downes родился в 1238 г. в местности чаурли, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Robert Downes II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Tabley, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fitton около 1280 г. в местности потт шригли, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1306 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Downes nació en 1238, en Chorley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Robert Downes II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes Tabley, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret Fitton aproximadamente 1280, en Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1306, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
